kh-subtitle: Every trophy, command, record, treasure and mission in one checklist — per character, saved in your browser. Commands you meld in the melding calculator are marked unlocked here automatically. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
bt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for every character? (Melding calculator data is kept.)
bt-badge-meld-tip: Marked as owned in the melding calculator
bt-badge-mission-tip: Unlocked by reaching max rank on its Unversed mission
bt-ingame-hint: In-game trophies have no platform achievement counterpart, but they count toward 100% completion in the Trinity Archives and several award commands.
bt-legend-commands: MELDED = marked as owned in the melding calculator. MAX RANK = earned from an Unversed mission high score (Unversed tab). TREASURE = dropped by a checked treasure chest (Treasures tab). Auto-unlocked rows can't be unchecked here — update them at their source.
bt-missions-hint: Each character must complete every mission once, and every mission rewards a Battle Command at max rank (high score). Reaching max rank as %1 marks that command as unlocked in %1's Command Collection. Max rank by any one character is enough for the Savage Slayer trophy.
bt-reward-tip: Battle Command awarded at max rank — this one needs the high score
bt-legend-missions: Savage Slayer trophy: %1 / %2 missions at max rank by at least one character.
bt-badge-treasure-tip: Dropped by a treasure chest you've checked off
bt-badge-recipe-tip: Obtained for an ice cream recipe you've made
bt-legend-treasures: Checking a chest whose reward is a command marks that command as unlocked on the Commands tab.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.

terra-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: From the passage to the Summit, go to the right and you will find two chests in a land section next to the waterfall.

terra-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
terra-treasures.how: Same as the Pulsing Crystal chest.

terra-treasures.name: Stop
terra-treasures.how: In the lower level, between a tree and a table with a set of chairs.

terra-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: From the save point, go forward and to the left. You will find the chest at the border of a broken path.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: In front of the passage to the Forest Clearing.

terra-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: Go through the gap in the main area and you will find it in a hill, in front of the firewall blocking the entrance to Maleficent's castle.

terra-treasures.name: Blizzard
terra-treasures.how: From the save point, up the hill to the left.

terra-treasures.name: Zero Gravity
terra-treasures.how: From the gate, facing the throne, go the right and you will find it in a corner.

terra-treasures.name: Ether
terra-treasures.how: To the right of the stairs leading to the Hallway.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: To the left of the throne.

terra-treasures.name: Ether
terra-treasures.how: In the same corridor as Aurora's room, in front of a window.

terra-treasures.name: Map
terra-treasures.how: Big chest next to the save point.

terra-treasures.name: Sleep
terra-treasures.how: To the left of the window.

terra-treasures.name: Attack Recipe
terra-treasures.how: Big chest to the right of the window.

terra-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
terra-treasures.how: In the lower level, next to the waterway and close to the boiling pot that takes you to the upper center level.

terra-treasures.name: Ether
terra-treasures.how: From the passage to the Magic Mirror Chamber, look back and you will see it to the left, next to a large chest that is actually an enemy.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: In the upper side level, you will see a small chest close to a big chest (which is actually an enemy).

terra-treasures.name: Flame Salvo
terra-treasures.how: In the upper center level. You can get there by turning on the boiling pot below with Fire commands, or by using two Sliding Dashes from the upper level where the passage to the Underground Waterway is.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: Hit the wheel in the lower level, go through the gate that opened on the back and you will find this chest next to another wheel.

terra-treasures.name: Block Recipe
terra-treasures.how: Hit the wheel in the upper level (the one next to the chest above), go through the gate that opened next to the waterway and you will find this chest up some stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Poison Edge
terra-treasures.how: Follow exactly the same path as for the Block Recipe, and go through the gateway next to that chest before the wheel time expires (you can go back and hit the first and second wheels again if you didn't make it). After going through the gateway, you will see two chests in the upper level next to the waterway.

terra-treasures.name: Fire
terra-treasures.how: Same as Poison Edge.

terra-treasures.name: Fission Firaga
terra-treasures.how: Climb the wall with an archway, and use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to the platform in the corner.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: Right next to the passage to the Underground Waterway.

terra-treasures.name: Map
terra-treasures.how: Big chest to the left of the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
terra-treasures.how: From the passage to the Courtyard, go forward and you will find it in a corner to the left.

terra-treasures.name: Thunderstorm
terra-treasures.how: In a corner, next to a sticker.

terra-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: In a corner to the right of the stairs leading to the castle.

terra-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
terra-treasures.how: Near the castle entrance, in the "porch" of the castle.

terra-treasures.name: Slow
terra-treasures.how: Facing the castle from the outside gates, go to the right and you will find this chest in a corner of the courtyard.

terra-treasures.name: Map
terra-treasures.how: Big chest near the save point.

terra-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
terra-treasures.how: In the balcony (upper level). You can get there via the Antechamber.

terra-treasures.name: Strike Raid
terra-treasures.how: In the lower level, to the left of the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: In the lower level, to the right of the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
terra-treasures.how: In the upper level, to the left of the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: In the upper level, to the right of the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Thunder
terra-treasures.how: In the corner of the room with the save point.

terra-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: At the border of the level.

terra-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
terra-treasures.how: From the tower entrance, go to the right.

terra-treasures.name: Cure
terra-treasures.how: Next to the entrance.

terra-treasures.name: Magic Recipe
terra-treasures.how: Big chest below the stairs.

terra-treasures.name: Fira
terra-treasures.how: Near the passage to the Purification Facility. If you're looking at it from the bridge, then you will find the chest to your left.

terra-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
terra-treasures.how: From the gates at the border of the area (where you find a sticker), you will see this chest to your left.

terra-treasures.name: Potion
terra-treasures.how: Near the passage to Castle Town.

terra-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
terra-treasures.how: Near the stairs leading down to the Entryway.

terra-treasures.name: Esuna
terra-treasures.how: At the end of a corridor, before going up to the waterway.

terra-treasures.name: Blackout
terra-treasures.how: Behind a machine in the waterway.

terra-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
terra-treasures.how: In a balcony along the waterway.

terra-treasures.name: Map
terra-treasures.how: Big chest in front of Merlin's House.

terra-treasures.name: Panacea
terra-treasures.how: In a corner in the lower side.

terra-treasures.name: Thunder Surge
terra-treasures.how: Use the fountains to reach the upmost level, and the use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to reach the isolated upper platform in the right corner.

terra-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
terra-treasures.how: Same as Thunder Surge.

ventus-treasures.name: Magic Recipe
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest on top of a furniture with a candle. Ride the ball of yarn to reach it.

ventus-treasures.name: Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the entrance to Cinderella's Room, drop down and you will see it near the passage to the Wardrobe Room.

ventus-treasures.name: Thunderstorm
ventus-treasures.how: From the Ether chest, use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to reach the upper ledge across the corridor.

ventus-treasures.name: Ether
ventus-treasures.how: From the Potion chest below, get to the upper level using the fork and follow the upper level path (the one without a box of matches) until you can go down to ledge with a fork and a chest. This is it.

ventus-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Near the green barrel with a passage to the Wardrobe Room.

ventus-treasures.name: Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Go through the passage in the Wardrobe Room next to a column. Once in the Mousehole, go straight ahead until the end and you will find it in a corner above.

ventus-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Behind the jumping fork in the area with the green barrel.

ventus-treasures.name: Zero Gravity
ventus-treasures.how: From the Ether chest in the Mousehole, go through the passage and you will appear on top of a wardrobe in the Wardrobe Room. Go through the ruler and jump onto the shelf with some books.

ventus-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
ventus-treasures.how: On top of a table in a corner.

ventus-treasures.name: Bllizzard
ventus-treasures.how: Below a table in the corner of the room across from the Ballon Letter chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the Zero Gravity chest, drop down carefully and land on some piled-up boxes with this chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
ventus-treasures.how: From the Forbidden Mountain passage, go straight and climb up to the upper level. Follow the path and go up the stairs to find 2 chests.

ventus-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the Maleficent's Throne passage, go straight and slightly to the right, and climb up to the upper level. Follow the path to find it.

ventus-treasures.name: Cure
ventus-treasures.how: From the Maleficent's Throne passage, to the right.

ventus-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystsal
ventus-treasures.how: Same as Ballon Letter chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Absolute Zero
ventus-treasures.how: From the Forbidden Mountain passage, go to the left and climb up the stairs to the upper level.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the Gates passage, across the room, to the right of the passage to the Hall.

ventus-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: In the upper level, near a passage to the Hall.

ventus-treasures.name: Tornado Strike
ventus-treasures.how: In the upper level, in a corner.

ventus-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the Hi-Potion chest below, take the green teleport. Then, follow the path straight ahead and you will find this.

ventus-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the Hi-Potion chest below, take the green teleport. Then, follow the path hugging the wall to the right and you will find this.

ventus-treasures.name: Magnet
ventus-treasures.how: Access the Hall from the passage in the lower level of the Dungeon (up the stairs), and take the purple teleport (it shifts between purple and yellow), then follow the path towards the chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the Fleeting Crystal chest in the Dungeon, take the passage nearby. You will find the chest to the right after getting to the Hall.

ventus-treasures.name: Ether
ventus-treasures.how: From the Waterside passage, to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Go through the gap in the main area and you will find it in a hill, in the path leading to Maleficent's castle.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest up the hill to the left from the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the gate, facing the throne, go the right and you will find it in a corner.

ventus-treasures.name: Thunder
ventus-treasures.how: To the left of the throne.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: In the same corridor as Aurora's room, in front of a window.

ventus-treasures.name: Sleep
ventus-treasures.how: In front of the window.

ventus-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Going straight forward from the bridge, hug the wall to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the gates at the border of the area, you will see this chest to your left.

ventus-treasures.name: Ether
ventus-treasures.how: Near the passage to Castle Town.

ventus-treasures.name: Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Near the stairs leading down to the Entryway.

ventus-treasures.name: Panacea
ventus-treasures.how: At the end of a corridor, before going up to the waterway.

ventus-treasures.name: Fira
ventus-treasures.how: Behind a machine in the waterway.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: In a balcony along the waterway.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest in front of Merlin's House.

ventus-treasures.name: Counter Rush
ventus-treasures.how: Use the fountains to reach the upmost level, and the use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to reach the isolated upper platform in the right corner.

ventus-treasures.name: Block Recipe
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest right next to the entrance.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the passage to Central Square, go straight hugging the wall to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Binding Strike
ventus-treasures.how: In a corner of the second floor, near a fountain.

ventus-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: In the second floor, below the gate to the Reactor.

ventus-treasures.name: Slow
ventus-treasures.how: After taking the steps to the third floor, go to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Near the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Freeze Raid
ventus-treasures.how: After going up the stairs, to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest to the right of the Fruitball Court.

ventus-treasures.name: Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Next to a popcorn machine.

ventus-treasures.name: Superglide
ventus-treasures.how: In the upper level, from the passage to Pete's Rec Room, Glide towards the ledge right across the area.

ventus-treasures.name: Reversal Slash
ventus-treasures.how: In the third floor, below the platform with the passage to Pete's Rec Room.

ventus-treasures.name: Slot Edge
ventus-treasures.how: In the upper level, from the passage to Pete's Rec Room, to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Shimmering Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: In a corner in the second floor.

ventus-treasures.name: Stop
ventus-treasures.how: Below the bridge, close to the passage to the Fruitball Court.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
ventus-treasures.how: Go to the upper level with the Mickey-shaped lift, jump through the gears and hands towards the left. This one is next to the passage to Pete's Rec Room.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Go to the upper level with the Mickey-shaped lift, jump through the gears and hands towards the right, until you reach a platform with two chests.

ventus-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Same as the Mega-Potion chest above.

ventus-treasures.name: Thunder
ventus-treasures.how: Across the entrance from the Main Plaza.

ventus-treasures.name: Thunder
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the green machine.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Go up with the Mickey-shaped lift and you will find this chest on a ledge.

ventus-treasures.name: Panacea
ventus-treasures.how: In a ledge to the left of the pinball minigame.

ventus-treasures.name: Action Recipe
ventus-treasures.how: Same as the Panacea chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Aerial Slam
ventus-treasures.how: Use the pinball bumpers to reach an upper level to the right.

ventus-treasures.name: Break Time
ventus-treasures.how: Locked in a cell in the pinball minigame. You need to touch all four green bumpers to open it.

ventus-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the passage to the Raceway.

ventus-treasures.name: Fire Strike
ventus-treasures.how: Facing the coliseum, you will find it next to the right statue.

ventus-treasures.name: Cura
ventus-treasures.how: Facing the coliseum, you will find it behind some columns next to the left statue.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the Vestibule entrance, next to the leaderboards to the right.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest in front of the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Abounding Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the transporter.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Near the passage to the Durgon Transporter.

ventus-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Same as the Hi-Potion chest above.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
ventus-treasures.how: Along the corridor.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Same as the Mega-Ether chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest near the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Thundara
ventus-treasures.how: On a platform in the 2nd level.

ventus-treasures.name: Zero Gravira
ventus-treasures.how: In the lower level (gravity must be enabled).

ventus-treasures.name: Pulse Bomb
ventus-treasures.how: On a platform in the 3rd level (gravity must be enabled).

ventus-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Above the gravity machine (disable gravity to reach it).

ventus-treasures.name: Mine Shield
ventus-treasures.how: In the upper level, on top of the platform in the middle (disable gravity to reach it).

ventus-treasures.name: Xehanort's Report 1
ventus-treasures.how: Disable gravity and use the floating platforms to reach the isolated balcony with a big chest on the upper level .

ventus-treasures.name: Mega Attack Recipe
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the passage to the Ship Hub.

ventus-treasures.name: Fire Surge
ventus-treasures.how: Across the room from the gravity machine and the Fleeting Crystal treasure chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: To the right of the gravity machine.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Near the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Megalixir
ventus-treasures.how: Near the passage to Skull Rock: Entrance.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: Same as the Megalixir chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Ether
ventus-treasures.how: Near the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: In the lower level, next to a slope.

ventus-treasures.name: Firaga
ventus-treasures.how: From the passage to the Cove, climb up the platform that is straight ahead and, once above, use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to reach the next upper platform.

ventus-treasures.name: Treasure Raid
ventus-treasures.how: From the passage to the Cove, go to the right and this chest will be hidden under a rock that needs to be destroyed.

ventus-treasures.name: Aeroga
ventus-treasures.how: Inside a cave you can reach by swimming in the water.

ventus-treasures.name: Blitz
ventus-treasures.how: From the upper platform mentioned in the Firaga chest above, you can use Glide to reach a passage above a palm tree, leading to an upper level in Mermaid Lagoon.

ventus-treasures.name: Elixir
ventus-treasures.how: In the border of the area, in a piece of land surrounded by water.

ventus-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: From the passage to the Mermaid Lagoon, to the right.

ventus-treasures.name: Panacea
ventus-treasures.how: Once you reach a bifurcation, instead of going right to Rainbow Falls: Base, go to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the passage to the Mermaid Lagoon.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
ventus-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

ventus-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest next to the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Abounding Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: In front of the save point.

ventus-treasures.name: Megalixir
ventus-treasures.how: At the border of the area.

ventus-treasures.name: Magnega
ventus-treasures.how: At the border of the level.

ventus-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: From the tower entrance, go to the right.

ventus-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
ventus-treasures.how: Next to the entrance.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega Magic Recipe
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest below the stairs.

ventus-treasures.name: Elixir
ventus-treasures.how: In the innermost area.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: When exiting the innermost area, to the left.

ventus-treasures.name: Map
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest close to the passage to the next area.

ventus-treasures.name: Wind Raid
ventus-treasures.how: In a corner of the pillar in the middle, on the opposite side from the Mega-Potion chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
ventus-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, go towards the pillar in the middle and you will soon see it.

ventus-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
ventus-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, hug the wall to the right and you will eventually find it.

ventus-treasures.name: Megalixir
ventus-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, hug the wall to the left and you will eventually find it.

ventus-treasures.name: Elixir
ventus-treasures.how: Near the Wind Raid chest.

ventus-treasures.name: Xehanort's Report 12
ventus-treasures.how: Big chest in the innermost area.

aqua-treasures.name: Shimmering Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Summit, go to the right and you will find two chests in a land section next to the waterfall.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Same as the Shimmering Crystal chest.

aqua-treasures.name: Bind
aqua-treasures.how: In the lower level, between a tree and a table with a set of chairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the save point, go forward and to the left. You will find the chest at the border of a broken path.

aqua-treasures.name: Magic Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest in a corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In a corner to the left of the stairs leading to the castle.

aqua-treasures.name: Slow
aqua-treasures.how: Facing the castle from the outside gates, follow the path to the left and you will eventually find it once you pass the gate with a sticker.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Facing the castle from the outside gates, go to the right and you will find this chest in a corner of the courtyard.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In the lower level, to the left of the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Barrier Surge
aqua-treasures.how: In the lower level, to the right of the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper level, to the left of the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Thunderstorm
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper level, to the right of the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
aqua-treasures.how: In the lower level, next to the waterway and close to the boiling pot that takes you to the upper center level.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Magic Mirror Chamber, look back and you will see it to the left, next to a large chest that is actually an enemy.

aqua-treasures.name: Shimmering Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper side level, you will see a small chest close to a big chest (which is actually an enemy).

aqua-treasures.name: Magnet
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper center level. You can get there by turning on the boiling pot below with Fire commands, or by using two Sliding Dashes from the upper level where the passage to the Underground Waterway is.

aqua-treasures.name: Shimmering Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Hit the wheel in the lower level, go through the gate that opened on the back and you will find this chest next to another wheel.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Hit the wheel in the upper level (the one next to the chest above), go through the gate that opened next to the waterway and you will find this chest up some stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Fire
aqua-treasures.how: Follow exactly the same path as for the Fleeting Crystal, and go through the gateway next to that chest before the wheel time expires (you can go back and hit the first and second wheels again if you didn't make it). After going through the gateway, you will see this chest in the upper level next to the waterway.

aqua-treasures.name: Fission Firaga
aqua-treasures.how: Climb the wall with an archway, and use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to the platform in the corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Right next to the passage to the Underground Waterway.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest to the left of the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Deep Woods, go to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Near the passage to the Flower Glade.

aqua-treasures.name: Ether
aqua-treasures.how: In front of the passage to the Cottage Clearing.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Near the passage to the Cottage Clearing.

aqua-treasures.name: Payback Surge
aqua-treasures.how: Behind the cottage.

aqua-treasures.name: Poison
aqua-treasures.how: Follow the creek to a hidden corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Attack Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest inside the cottage.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest next to the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Absolute Zero
aqua-treasures.how: From the Forbidden Mountain passage, go straight and climb up to the upper level. Follow the path and go up the stairs to find 2 chests.

aqua-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the Maleficent's Throne passage, go straight and slightly to the right, and climb up to the upper level. Follow the path to find it.

aqua-treasures.name: Cure
aqua-treasures.how: From the Maleficent's Throne passage, to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Absolute Zero chest.

aqua-treasures.name: Sleep
aqua-treasures.how: From the Forbidden Mountain passage, go to the left and climb up the stairs to the upper level.

aqua-treasures.name: Confusion Strike
aqua-treasures.how: On the right side of the throne.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper level, near a passage to the Hall.

aqua-treasures.name: Ice Barrage
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper level, in a corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: From the Waterside passage, to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Ether
aqua-treasures.how: In front of the passage leading to Maleficent's castle.

aqua-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
aqua-treasures.how: Go through the gap in the main area and you will find it in a hill, in the path leading to Maleficent's castle.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Near the passage to the Forest Clearing.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: From the save point, up the hill to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Near the passage to Castle Town.

aqua-treasures.name: Ether
aqua-treasures.how: Near the stairs leading down to the Entryway.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: At the end of a corridor, before going up to the waterway.

aqua-treasures.name: Thundara
aqua-treasures.how: Behind a machine in the waterway.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In a balcony along the waterway.

aqua-treasures.name: Block Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Thundara.

aqua-treasures.name: Counter Blast
aqua-treasures.how: Use the fountains to reach the upmost level, and the use Air Slide or Sliding Dash to reach the isolated upper platform in the right corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Counter Blast.

aqua-treasures.name: Xehanort's Report 3
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest right next to the entrance.

aqua-treasures.name: Zero Gravity
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to Central Square, go straight hugging the wall to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Wellspring Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In a corner of the second floor, near a fountain.

aqua-treasures.name: Strike Raid
aqua-treasures.how: In the second floor, below the gate to the Reactor.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: After taking the steps to the third floor, go to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest in front of the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Panacea
aqua-treasures.how: From the save point facing the castle, to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Mine Square
aqua-treasures.how: After going up the stairs, to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest to the right of the Fruitball Court.

aqua-treasures.name: Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Next to a popcorn machine.

aqua-treasures.name: Abounding Crytsal
aqua-treasures.how: In a corner in the second floor.

aqua-treasures.name: Fira
aqua-treasures.how: Below the bridge, close to the passage to the Fruitball Court.

aqua-treasures.name: Slot Edge
aqua-treasures.how: In the upper level, from the passage to Pete's Rec Room, to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Go to the upper level with the Mickey-shaped lift, jump through the gears and hands towards the left. This one is next to the passage to Pete's Rec Room.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Go to the upper level with the Mickey-shaped lift, jump through the gears and hands towards the right, until you reach a platform with two chests.

aqua-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Action Recipe.

aqua-treasures.name: Thunder
aqua-treasures.how: Across the entrance from the Main Plaza.

aqua-treasures.name: Thunder
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the green machine.

aqua-treasures.name: Pulsing Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Go up with the Mickey-shaped lift and you will find two chests on a ledge.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Pulsing Crystal.

aqua-treasures.name: Panacea
aqua-treasures.how: In a ledge to the left of the pinball minigame.

aqua-treasures.name: Action Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Same as Panacea.

aqua-treasures.name: Aerial Slam
aqua-treasures.how: Use the pinball bumpers to reach an upper level to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Break Time
aqua-treasures.how: Locked in a cell in the pinball minigame. You need to touch all four green bumpers to open it.

aqua-treasures.name: Soothing Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the passage to the Raceway.

aqua-treasures.name: Fire Strike
aqua-treasures.how: Facing the coliseum, you will find it next to the right statue.

aqua-treasures.name: Cura
aqua-treasures.how: Facing the coliseum, you will find it behind some columns next to the left statue.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: From the Vestibule entrance, next to the leaderboards to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest in front of the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Teleport
aqua-treasures.how: In a cell in the 7th level.

aqua-treasures.name: Blitz
aqua-treasures.how: In a cell in the 7th level.

aqua-treasures.name: Abounding Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In a cell in the 3rd level.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In a cell in the 3rd level.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest next to the transporter.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the transporter.

aqua-treasures.name: Ether
aqua-treasures.how: Near the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
aqua-treasures.how: In the hallway.

aqua-treasures.name: Fire Surge
aqua-treasures.how: In the lower level (gravity must be enabled).

aqua-treasures.name: Prism Rain
aqua-treasures.how: On a platform in the 3rd level (gravity must be enabled).

aqua-treasures.name: Zero Gravira
aqua-treasures.how: Disable gravity and use the floating platforms to reach the isolated balcony on the upper level.

aqua-treasures.name: Hungry Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: Across the room from the gravity machine and the Mega-Ether treasure chest.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
aqua-treasures.how: To the right of the gravity machine.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega Attack Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest in front of the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Firaga Burst
aqua-treasures.how: Inside a cave you can reach by swimming in the water.

aqua-treasures.name: Elixir
aqua-treasures.how: In the border of the area, in a piece of land surrounded by water.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Mermaid Lagoon, to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Ether
aqua-treasures.how: Once you reach a bifurcation, instead of going right to Rainbow Falls: Base, go to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Hi-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the passage to the Mermaid Lagoon.

aqua-treasures.name: Mine Shield
aqua-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Elixir
aqua-treasures.how: Up the stairs.

aqua-treasures.how: Big chest next to the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: In front of the save point.

aqua-treasures.name: Panacea
aqua-treasures.how: On an elevated platform.

aqua-treasures.name: Fleeting Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In a corner.

aqua-treasures.name: Time Splicer
aqua-treasures.how: In the upmost level.

aqua-treasures.name: Thundaga
aqua-treasures.how: In the lowest level.

aqua-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: In the lowest level.

aqua-treasures.name: Firaga
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to Rainbow Falls: Base, go to the right and keep going up and following the upper path.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the passage to Rainbow Falls: Ascent.

aqua-treasures.name: Magnega
aqua-treasures.how: At the border of the level.

aqua-treasures.name: Shimmering Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the tower entrance, go to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Megalixir
aqua-treasures.how: Next to the entrance.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega Magic Recipe
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest below the stairs.

aqua-treasures.name: Elixir
aqua-treasures.how: In the innermost area.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: When exiting the innermost area, to the left.

aqua-treasures.name: Map
aqua-treasures.how: Big chest close to the passage to the next area.

aqua-treasures.name: Aeroga
aqua-treasures.how: In a corner of the pillar in the middle, on the opposite side from the Mega-Potion chest.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Ether
aqua-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, go towards the pillar in the middle and you will soon see it.

aqua-treasures.name: Mega-Potion
aqua-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, hug the wall to the right and you will eventually find it.

aqua-treasures.name: Megalixir
aqua-treasures.how: When coming from Seat of War, hug the wall to the left and you will eventually find it.

aqua-treasures.name: Zero Graviga
aqua-treasures.how: From the starting point, follow the path to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Blackout
aqua-treasures.how: Follow the passage near the Zero Graviga chest. This chest is in that lower area.

aqua-treasures.name: Balloon Letter
aqua-treasures.how: In the second level, near a jumping dark aura.

aqua-treasures.name: Chaos Crystal
aqua-treasures.how: From the Balloon Letter chest, go up to the third level and drop down the cliff. This chest is right where you drop down.

aqua-treasures.name: Secret Gem
aqua-treasures.how: You should find this on your way to the Upper Zone. It is on a narrow path, slightly before the passage to the Upper Zone.

aqua-treasures.name: Transcendence
aqua-treasures.how: Drop down from the Upper Zone. This chest is in the border of the circular area you land on.

aqua-treasures.name: Triple Firaga
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Lower Zone, go to the right.

aqua-treasures.name: Megalixir
aqua-treasures.how: From the passage to the Lower Zone, go to the left.
